     The Numbers Business Report

Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $34,516,558Details
International Box Office $37,698,454
Worldwide Box Office $72,215,012
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a painful breakup, Clementine undergoes a procedure to erase memories of her former boyfriend Joel from her mind. When Joel discovers that Clementine is going to extremes to forget their relationship, he undergoes the same procedure and slowly begins to forget the woman that he loved.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,175,198 (23.7% of total gross)
Legs:4.22 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,353 opening theaters/1,357 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $66,337,410

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 19th, 2004 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: April 15th, 2004 (Limited) (Australia)
November 10th, 2005 (Wide), released as Eternal Sunshine (South Korea)
May 26th, 2006 (Wide), released as Sil Baştan (Turkey)
December 21st, 2023 (Limited) (South Korea)
May 16th, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: September 28th, 2004 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for language, some drug and sexual content.
Running Time: 108 minutes
Award win: Writers Guild of America Best Original Screenplay Winner
Cast, crew, or production detail: Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Faulty Memory, Infidelity, Love Triangle, Narcotics, Non-Chronological, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Social setting: Valentine's Day
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Anonymous Content, This is That
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
